zh.Stretford, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾斯特特福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibilla de La Bere於1338年5月19日出生在英國賀福爾時，她的父親John de La Bere43歲，母親Agnes de Turberville39歲。她於1371年10月18日與Sir Thomas de Crophull在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1381年11月18日之前在英國。

zh-hans.Stretford, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾斯特特福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibilla de La Bere于1338年5月19日出生在英国賀福爾时，她的父亲John de La Bere43岁，母亲Agnes de Turberville39岁。她于1371年10月18日与Sir Thomas de Crophull在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1381年11月18日之前在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Bere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Beer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erhard, Hans, Heinz, Aloys, Bodo, Erna, Ernst, Frieda, Friedhelm, Hanni.

English (West Country): habitational name from any of the forty or so places in southwestern England called Beer(e) or Bear(e). Most of these derive their names from the West Saxon dative case, beara, of Old English bearu ‘grove, wood’ (the standard Old English dative bearwe being preserved in Barrow ). In some cases the surname may be topographic in origin, from atte beare ‘at the grove’. Some may be from Middle English bere ‘woodland swine-pasture’ (Old English bǣr). Compare Bear 1.

nameMeanings.name: Sibilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. en.lifeSummary: When Sibilla de La Bere was born on 19 May 1338, in Herefordshire, England, her father, John de La Bere, was 43 and her mother, Agnes de Turberville, was 39. She married Sir Thomas de Crophull on 18 October 1371, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 18 November 1381, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibilla de La Bere est née le 19 mai 1338, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de La Bere, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Turberville, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Crophull le 18 octobre 1371, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 18 novembre 1381, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibilla de La Bere am 19. Mai 1338 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de La Bere 43 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Turberville 39. Sie hat am 18. Oktober 1371 in England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas de Crophull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 18. November 1381 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla de La Bere è nata il il 19 maggio 1338 nel Herefordshire, England, sua padre, John de La Bere, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Turberville, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Crophull il 18 ottobre 1371, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 18 novembre 1381, nel England.

ko.lifeSummary: Sibilla de La Bere(이)가 1338년 5월 19일 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de La Bere(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Turberville(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1371년 10월 18일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Thomas de Crophull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 11월 18일 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.19 May 1338–before 18 November 1381: 19 de maio de 1338–antes 18 de novembro de 1381
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla de La Bere nasceu em 19 de maio de 1338, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de La Bere, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Turberville, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Crophull em 18 de outubro de 1371, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 18 de novembro de 1381, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibilla de La Bere родилась 19 мая 1338 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de La Bere было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Turberville, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Crophull 18 октября 1371 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 18 ноябрь 1381 г. в местности Англия.

Se casó con Sir Thomas de Crophull el 18 de octubre de 1371, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 18 de noviembre de 1381, en Inglaterra.
